title: RESTORE - 211info
text: WOODBURN RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Accepts donations and may pickup large items. 245 Young Street Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm, Sunday noon-5pm Donations: During all business days before 4pm Email (503) 902-0645 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 902-0645 Woodburn ReStore Intake (855) 500-4161 Donation pickup Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Restore: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Facebook page located under Canby and Woodburn ReStores may display new inventory or events. Donations: Visit website to check the list of acceptable donations under the Donate tab at the top. Submit a request for donation pickup through the website or call. FEES: Varies depending on item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WOODBURN RESTORE
